description: VERIFIED LIVE: CSDN via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links use the /article/details/ path with the title as link text. Navigate the tab to csdn.net (home, a feed, or a search) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 41 articles with title and url extracted correctly.

tools.name: csdn_articles
tools.description: Article links on the current CSDN page (home, a feed, or search). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each article's title and url (blog.csdn.net/.../article/details/<id>). VERIFIED (41 articles).
